title: OpenEPCIS Detergent Vocabulary
description:
Detergent-specific vocabulary for EU Regulation 2026/405 on Detergents and Surfactants compliance.

IMPORTANT: The detergent extension properties defined here are NOT YET STANDARDISED by GS1.
These are OpenEPCIS extensions for detergent DPP data that have no equivalent in GS1 standards.

EPCIS 2.0 Extension:
This vocabulary is a first-class EPCIS 2.0 extension per Section 12.3. Declare it using:
  GS1-Extensions: eudet=https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/eu/detergent/

EU Regulation 2026/405 replaces the legacy Detergents Regulation 648/2004 and mandates
Digital Product Passports for detergents. Entry into force: March 2026, full application:
September 2029. Detergents are a priority product category under ESPR 2024/1781.

The DPP is model-based: same manufacturer + identical formulation = one DPP (not per batch).

This vocabulary provides:
- Domain-specific enumerations (DetergentCategory, ProductForm, SurfactantType, etc.)
- Extension properties for detergent-specific formulation and biodegradability data
- INCI ingredient nomenclature support
- CLP hazard classification properties
- Surfactant biodegradability test results per Annex III
- Microorganism disclosure per Article 19

For master data, use standard GS1 Web Vocabulary:
- gs1:Product for products
- gs1:Organization for supply chain actors
- gs1:QuantitativeValue for measurements

For shared DPP patterns, reuse from core:
- oec:HazardousSubstance for CLP-classified substances
- oec:OperatorInformation for economic operator data
- oec:DocumentReference for safety data sheets and reports

References:
- EU Regulation 2026/405: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32026R0405
- ESPR 2024/1781: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1781
- Legacy Regulation 648/2004: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32004R0648

classes.label: Detergent Product
classes.comment: A detergent or surfactant product subject to EU 2026/405. Use as @type alongside gs1:Product. The DPP is model-based: same manufacturer + identical formulation = one DPP.

classes.label: Fragrance Allergen
classes.comment: A fragrance allergen that must be disclosed when present above the concentration threshold, identified by name and CAS number.

classes.label: Ingredient
classes.comment: A single ingredient entry in a detergent formulation, identified by INCI name with functional role and weight percentage range.

classes.label: Microorganism Information
classes.comment: Information about microorganisms intentionally added to the detergent product per Article 19. Requires species identification and strain designation.

classes.label: Surfactant Biodegradability
classes.comment: Ultimate aerobic biodegradability test result for a surfactant per EU 2026/405 Annex III. Each surfactant type in the formulation requires a separate test result.

properties.label: Allergen CAS Number
properties.comment: CAS registry number of the fragrance allergen.

properties.label: Allergen Concentration
properties.comment: Concentration of the allergen as weight percentage.

properties.label: Biodegradability Test Report
properties.comment: Reference to the full biodegradability test report. Reuses oec:DocumentReference.

properties.label: Biodegradation Percentage
properties.comment: Measured ultimate aerobic biodegradation as percentage (>=60% required to pass).

properties.label: Dosage Instructions
properties.comment: Human-readable dosage instructions including water hardness guidance.

properties.label: End Product Characteristics
properties.comment: Description of the end product characteristics of the microorganism (enzymes produced, metabolites, etc.).

properties.label: Film Biodegradability Percentage
properties.comment: Measured biodegradability of the water-soluble film as a percentage.

properties.label: Film Biodegradable
properties.comment: Whether the water-soluble film (for capsules/pods) meets biodegradability requirements.

properties.label: Fragrance Allergens
properties.comment: Fragrance allergens present above the disclosure threshold.

properties.label: Hazardous Substances
properties.comment: CLP-classified hazardous substances in the product. Reuses oec:HazardousSubstance.

properties.label: Hazard Pictograms
properties.comment: GHS hazard pictogram codes (GHS01-GHS09) per CLP Regulation 1272/2008.

properties.label: H Statements
properties.comment: CLP hazard statements (e.g., H302, H315, H318).

properties.label: Ingredient Function
properties.comment: Functional role of the ingredient in the formulation.

properties.label: Ingredient List
properties.comment: List of ingredients in the detergent formulation, using INCI nomenclature.

properties.label: Intended Use
properties.comment: Description of the product's intended use or application.

properties.label: Is Surfactant
properties.comment: Whether this ingredient is a surfactant (relevant for biodegradability testing requirements).

properties.label: Microorganisms
properties.comment: Microorganisms intentionally added to the product per Article 19.

properties.label: Passes Ultimate Biodegradability
properties.comment: Whether the surfactant passes the ultimate aerobic biodegradability test (>=60% within 28 days).

properties.label: Phosphate Compliant
properties.comment: Whether the product complies with phosphorus/phosphate limits set by the regulation.

properties.label: Phosphorus Content Percent
properties.comment: Total elemental phosphorus content as weight percentage.

properties.label: Product Form
properties.comment: The physical form of the detergent product (liquid, powder, capsule, etc.).

properties.label: P Statements
properties.comment: CLP precautionary statements (e.g., P101, P102, P280).

properties.label: Recommended Dosage
properties.comment: Recommended dosage per use (e.g., 35 ml for medium water hardness). Uses gs1:QuantitativeValue.

properties.label: Safety Data Sheet
properties.comment: Reference to the product's Safety Data Sheet (SDS). Reuses oec:DocumentReference.

properties.label: Signal Word
properties.comment: CLP signal word (Danger or Warning) per Regulation 1272/2008.

properties.label: Strain Designation
properties.comment: Specific strain designation or collection number.

properties.label: Surfactant Biodegradability
properties.comment: Biodegradability test results for surfactants in the formulation per Annex III.

properties.label: Surfactant Type
properties.comment: Classification of the surfactant by ionic charge.

properties.label: Test Duration Days
properties.comment: Duration of the biodegradability test in days (typically 28 days).

properties.label: Test Method
properties.comment: Standard test method used for the biodegradability assessment.

properties.label: Weight Percent Range
properties.comment: Weight percentage range using prescribed brackets (e.g., '<5%', '5-15%', '15-30%', '>=30%') per labelling requirements.

enumerations.label: Biodegradability Test Method
enumerations.comment: Standard test methods for ultimate aerobic biodegradability per EU 2026/405 Annex III.

values.label: ISO 14593
values.comment: CO2 headspace test (ISO 14593) for ultimate aerobic biodegradability.

values.label: OECD 301B
values.comment: CO2 evolution test (modified Sturm test) for ready biodegradability.

values.label: OECD 301D
values.comment: Closed bottle test for ready biodegradability.

values.label: OECD 301F
values.comment: Manometric respirometry test for ready biodegradability.

values.label: OECD 310
values.comment: CO2 in sealed vessels test for ready biodegradability.

enumerations.label: Detergent Category
enumerations.comment: Product categories for detergents and surfactants per EU 2026/405 Article 2.

values.label: All-Purpose Cleaner
values.comment: General surface cleaning product for household or commercial use.

values.label: Dishwasher Detergent
values.comment: Detergent intended for automatic dishwashing machines.

values.label: Hand Dishwashing Detergent
values.comment: Detergent intended for washing dishes by hand.

values.label: Industrial Detergent
values.comment: Detergent intended for industrial cleaning applications.

values.label: Institutional Detergent
values.comment: Detergent intended for institutional cleaning (hospitals, schools, etc.).

values.label: Laundry Detergent
values.comment: Detergent intended for washing textiles in household or commercial laundry machines.

values.label: Surfactant
values.comment: Surface-active agent sold as a standalone product or raw material.

enumerations.label: Ingredient Function
enumerations.comment: Functional roles of ingredients in detergent formulations.

values.label: Anti-Redeposition
values.comment: Agent preventing removed soil from redepositing on surfaces.

values.label: Bleach
values.comment: Oxidising agent for stain removal (e.g., sodium percarbonate).

values.label: Builder
values.comment: Water softener that enhances surfactant performance (e.g., zeolites, citrates).

values.label: Colorant
values.comment: Dye or pigment for product appearance.

values.label: Enzyme
values.comment: Biological catalyst for breaking down specific stain types (protease, amylase, lipase, etc.).

values.label: Filler
values.comment: Inert bulk material (e.g., sodium sulphate in powder detergents).

values.label: Foam Regulator
values.comment: Agent that controls foam generation (booster or suppressor).

values.label: Fragrance
values.comment: Scenting agent (parfum).

values.label: pH Adjuster
values.comment: Acid or base used to control product pH.

values.label: Preservative
values.comment: Antimicrobial agent preventing product degradation.

values.label: Solvent
values.comment: Carrier liquid (typically water or alcohol-based).

values.label: Surfactant
values.comment: Surface-active agent providing primary cleaning action.

values.label: Thickener
values.comment: Viscosity modifier for product consistency.

enumerations.label: Product Form
enumerations.comment: Physical form of the detergent product.

values.label: Capsule
values.comment: Water-soluble film capsule (pod) containing liquid or powder detergent.

values.label: Gel
values.comment: Gel formulation.

values.label: Liquid
values.comment: Liquid formulation.

values.label: Paste
values.comment: Paste formulation.

values.label: Powder
values.comment: Powder formulation.

values.label: Sheet
values.comment: Dissolvable sheet formulation.

values.label: Spray
values.comment: Spray formulation.

values.label: Tablet
values.comment: Compressed tablet formulation.

enumerations.label: Signal Word
enumerations.comment: CLP signal words per EU Regulation 1272/2008 Article 20.

values.label: Danger
values.comment: Signal word for more severe hazard categories.

values.label: Warning
values.comment: Signal word for less severe hazard categories.

enumerations.label: Surfactant Type
enumerations.comment: Classification of surfactants by ionic charge per EU 2026/405 Annex III.

values.label: Amphoteric
values.comment: Surfactant that can carry positive or negative charge depending on pH (e.g., betaines).

values.label: Anionic
values.comment: Surfactant with a negatively charged hydrophilic group (e.g., LAS, SLS).

values.label: Cationic
values.comment: Surfactant with a positively charged hydrophilic group (e.g., quaternary ammonium).

values.label: Non-Ionic
values.comment: Surfactant with no ionic charge (e.g., alcohol ethoxylates).
